name: nextjs-dashboard
description: Next.js App Router dashboard agent — server components reading from Supabase, Tailwind styling, dark-mode-aware. Matches the writers-dashboard / sales-dashboard / news-reader pattern. Visible at /agents/<slug>/ once provisioned; workflow steps can call its /api/data endpoint to consume the same data as JSON.

endpoints.description: The dashboard UI (HTML). Visible at /agents/<slug>/ on shellagent.io.
JSON version of the dashboard's data — for workflow consumption.

output_shape_from_api_data.summary: object — aggregates / counts / metrics for chaining

example_workflow: 2. Agent step: call this dashboard agent's /api/data

post_provision_notes: This agent uses Caddy strip_prefix routing — the dashboard runs locally at /, but Caddy serves it under /agents/<slug>/.
All internal links must go through the BP() helper in src/lib/bp.ts so they pick up the basePath correctly.
If you point this at a different Supabase project than SHA's own, set SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in .env.
